source_pr.title: store/tikv: refine errors for undetermined result
source_pr.body:
Hi,

This PR refines errors for undetermined results. It returns key errors without wrapping when committing tasks.

PTAL @disksing @coocood @tiancaiamao

symptoms: Revise commit-intercept tests to avoid race when injecting s.store.client (store/tikv/2pc_test.go)
failure_signature: Revise commit-intercept tests to avoid race when injecting s.store.client (store/tikv/2pc_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a race in test instrumentation around intercepting the commit RPC path. Mutating shared client state in a gocheck suite can race with async operations and make the assertions nondeterministic. This PR stabilizes it by restructuring/splitting the test cases and isolating the intercept client injection so it no longer races.
fix_pattern: Isolate per-test state when intercepting async RPC paths (avoid racy shared client mutation) by refactoring/splitting the tests.

evidence: evidence: revise test case to fix race (store/tikv/2pc_test.go)

analysis:
